entity.summary: Solana perpetual decentralized exchange using frequent batch clearing, a uniform clearing price, resting orderbook liquidity, an LP vault, and API-connected market makers through current trader and simplified trading interfaces.
entity.notes: Current first-party materials state that Sour v1.0 is live on Solana mainnet, links the production application, and describes market and limit orders, batch settlement, fees, liquidity sources, API and WebSocket integration. No exact initial launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Sour perpetual DEX
evidence.notes: First-party site identifies Sour as a live Solana mainnet perpetual DEX using batch clearing and links trading, market, earn, developer, audit, program-ID, and security surfaces.

evidence.title: Sour trading application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes the production market, trading, liquidity, API, and protocol-status surfaces used by the Solana mainnet exchange.
